changes: PIOS annotation updated to 51.8R; lineage extended
guided-entry-strip inner wrapper added — horizontal row for steps
persona-gate-message moved outside strip (renders below row)
[amendment] handleDemoNext: setDemoComplete(true) at traversal end instead of handleDemoExit
[amendment] persona-change-reset useEffect added (deps: enlPersona, demoActive, demoComplete)
PIOS annotation updated to 51.8R; lineage extended
RawArtifactsSection: label 'View raw evidence' when prominent, 'View raw artifacts' otherwise
RawArtifactsSection: prominent CSS classes added (raw-artifacts-section-prominent, raw-artifacts-toggle-prominent)
ANALYST prominent render added before chain (after PersonaNarrativeHeader)
ANALYST bottom render removed (replaced by top prominent render)
[amendment] analyst-source-header: 'ANALYST MODE — SOURCE EVIDENCE' added when prominent
[amendment] hide label: 'Hide source-level evidence' when prominent and open
.raw-artifacts-toggle-prominent: larger toggle button with orange color

modified.change: ENLPanel isolation check updated: '51.8' not in enl → 'PIOS-51.8-RUN01-CONTRACT-v1' not in enl
modified.justification: 51.8R explicitly supersedes ENLPanel non-modification assertion in 51.8. PIOS-51.8-RUN01-CONTRACT-v1 is still not in ENLPanel (it carries 51.8R). Validator precision improved.
51.8R guided correction adds guidedStepIndex + rawStepActive useState — explicit guided flow state, not coupling. Supersedes <= 12 bound.

modified.change: [guided correction] Removed 'if (!queryId) return null' gate — persona selector renders always. ENL output re-gated as selectedPersona && queryId. Fetch still gated by both.
modified.justification: Persona must be selectable before query to support guided entry flow. Fetch and ENL output remain gated by queryId.

modified.change: [guided correction] GuidedBar component added. New props: guidedSteps, guidedStepIndex, guidedPersona. GuidedBar routed before TraversalBar when guidedSteps present.
modified.justification: Persona-specific step indicator required. All prior DemoController logic (TraversalBar, StageBar, FlowSelector) preserved intact.

modified.change: [guided correction] 4 supersessions: PersonaPanel ungated from query; DemoController check → lineage preservation; Start button check → dual gate; source label check updated.
modified.justification: Guided correction changes behavior covered by these checks. Each supersession reflects the new correct behavior.
Dual gate supersedes persona-only button disable. Persona gate is still the first gate in handleStartDemo.
